content: وَضَعَ الْبَلَدُ حَقيقِيٌّ بَقيَ سَئًا جِدًّا
translations: eng:the situation of the country has really deteriorated a lot

transcriptions.arabizi: wadaA ilbalad ha'ee'i ba'a sa' giddan
